\tzpentry{ID3455}{Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3455 introduces Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi(x_1, x_2, t) = \psi_1(x_1, t)\psi_2(x_2, t) \]
